data.name: Hard filter applied during Mirror Sync: only packages belonging to one of these components are downloaded and stored. Comma-separated (e.g. main,universe,multiverse,restricted). Changes take effect on the next Mirror Sync job run.
data.value: 镜像同步期间应用了硬性过滤器：仅下载并存储属于这些组件之一的软件包。使用逗号分隔（例如 main,universe,multiverse,restricted）。更改将在下次运行镜像同步任务时生效。

data.name: Hard filter applied during Mirror Sync: only packages whose architecture matches one of these values are downloaded and stored. Comma-separated (e.g. amd64,arm64). Changes take effect on the next Mirror Sync job run.
data.value: 镜像同步期间应用了硬过滤：仅下载并存储架构与这些值之一匹配的包。以逗号分隔（例如 amd64,arm64）。更改将在下一次镜像同步作业运行时生效。

data.name: If checked, no signature verification will be performed. Use at your own risk.
data.value: 如果勾选，将不执行签名验证。请自行承担风险。

data.name: Optional URL to the upstream public GPG key for verification.
data.value: 用于验证的上游公共 GPG 密钥的可选 URL。

data.name: The base URL of the upstream server (e.g. 'https://mirrors.ubuntu.com/'). Distro name will be appended automatically.
data.value: 上游服务器的基础 URL（例如 'https://mirrors.ubuntu.com/'）。发行版名称将自动附加。

data.name: The URL prefix for this mirror (e.g. 'ubuntu').
data.value: 此镜像的 URL 前缀（例如 'ubuntu'）。
